query_text: What's the deepest drillhole in the Crackingstone Property?
description: Citation-style answer expects document spine + at most one supporting collar/spatial. Graph evidence is excluded by the factual_lookup quota.

query_text: What was the top assay grade in PLS-22-08?
Integrate all evidence for the Crackingstone Corridor mineralisation
description: Balanced quota across documents + spatial + assay + table/collar/graph. At least 3 distinct kinds expected.

query_text: What's the geological story of this property?
What geological models could explain the Cu-Au anomaly at depth?
description: Hypothesis quota prefers graph (relationship paths) + assay (numerical anchors) over documents.

query_text: Show me grade outliers in the south corridor
description: Anomaly quota: assay=5, table=3, document=1. The answer IS the numeric table — protect assay AND document.

query_text: Which assay intervals are flagged QA/QC suspect?
How certain are we about the mineralisation depth?
description: Uncertainty quota: balanced document + assay + spatial. Conflict-detection enabled by the retrieval profile.

query_text: Should we drill the corridor at coordinates 105.4W 39.5N this season?
description: Decision quota: document=4 (regulatory spine). Documents protected.

query_text: Give me an executive summary of the Crackingstone project
description: Project summary is SQL-aggregate-first; quota is doc+table only.

query_text: Which drillholes have no downstream assay data?
description: Coverage gap quota: table=3 (the gap rows ARE the answer); table protected.

query_text: What does the technical report say about the Cu zone?
description: Authority invariant — NI 43-101 must appear before an Internal Memo in the prepared packet, regardless of input order.

query_text: What's the total depth of hole DDH-1234?
description: Diversity invariant — factual_lookup quota for graph is 0. Even when input has graph evidence, the output packet must not.

query_text: Pick the most relevant doc for this project
description: Budget invariant — a small packet under the per-intent quota should always reach the budget target.

query_text: Anything about this project at all?
description: Edge — an empty input packet must produce an empty output packet without raising.

query_text: What does the internal memo say?
description: When the ONLY available document is rank-5 (Internal Memo), authority sort doesn't make it disappear — it's still the only spine.

query_text: Show me all anomalous grades
description: Anomaly intent with NO document evidence — the protected_kinds set includes document; the answer should still surface the assays. (reached_budget may or may not be True depending on packet size; we only assert the assays survive.)

query_text: Summarise the corridor based purely on the reports
description: Synthesis with only document evidence — diversity pass can't add kinds that aren't there; output still authority-sorts the docs.

query_text: Which assays have QA/QC issues in the south corridor?
description: Anomaly path that surfaces QA/QC-flagged assays. The quota lets assays dominate (≥3 expected when input is rich).

query_text: Where are the high-grade zones spatially?
description: Synthesis with mostly spatial evidence — the protected set is {document}, so when no doc is present the budget pass MAY return unreached. The shape we lock: spatial is preserved.

query_text: Tell me everything about the corridor mineralisation
description: High-volume synthesis with many evidence members. The budget pass should trim; remaining_budget MUST end ≥ 0 because synthesis allows trimming non-protected kinds.

query_text: Which drillholes have only basic data?
description: Coverage_gap with table-only input — table is the protected kind for this intent.

query_text: What's the latest mineralisation interpretation?
description: Two NI 43-101 docs in input — one current, one superseded. Authority sort places the CURRENT one first.

query_text: What models could explain the deep Cu enrichment?
description: Hypothesis quota: graph=3 — graph paths must be preserved at the top of the packet when available.

query_text: Brief me on the project
description: project_summary quota: spatial=0, assay=0, collar=0, graph=0. Only doc+table survive.

query_text: Should we permit the corridor for drilling next season?
description: Decision quota: document=4 — documents dominate the prepared packet.
